query:
SELECT id, poNumber, batchNo, serialNumber, imei, productName, sheetRowNumber, archivedAt, createdAt, updatedAt
FROM products
WHERE batchNo = 'NO-IMPORT-BATCH-1778749383598'
   OR serialNumber = 'V42J4RV4FF'
   OR batchNo IN ('Q49QF04603', '00500025410')
   OR imei IN ('C0VQYGX30H', '353103648954639')
ORDER BY createdAt ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT id, poNumber, batchNo, serialNumber, imei, productName, sheetRowNumber, archivedAt, createdAt, updatedAt
FROM products
WHERE batchNo = 'NO-IMPORT-BATCH-1778749383598'
   OR serialNumber = 'V42J4RV4FF'
   OR batchNo IN ('Q49QF04603', '00500025410')
   OR imei IN ('C0VQYGX30H', '353103648954639')
ORDER BY createdAt ASC;
